verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: Noe was 600 years old when the flood came on.

verses.book: The Extant Fragments of the Five Books of the Chronography of Julius Africanus.
verses.text: From Adam, therefore, to Noe and the flood, are 2262 years.
